---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with the library
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Hardware
- **Board**: (e.g., Raspberry Pi Pico W)
- **Sensor**: (e.g., DS18B20)
- **Pull-up resistor**: (e.g., 4.7 kΩ to 3.3V)
- **GPIO pin**: (e.g., GP2)

## Software
- **Arduino Core**: (e.g., arduino-pico 3.x.x)
- **Library Version**: (e.g., 1.0.0)
- **IDE**: (e.g., Arduino IDE 2.3, PlatformIO)

## Minimal Sketch to Reproduce
```cpp
// Paste the smallest possible sketch that triggers the bug
```

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (include Serial Monitor output if applicable).
